---
title: "Your Project Title"
subtitle: "Project Subtitle"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    theme: yeti
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    number-sections: true
    css: custom-style.css
editor: visual
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
  fig-align: center
  fig-width: 8
  fig-height: 5
  fig-dpi: 150
---

```{r setup}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Load required libraries
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)
library(knitr)
library(scales)

# Set working directory (update this for your project)
# setwd("your/project/path")

# --- Consistent ggplot2 Theme ---
theme_set(
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#005f73", hjust = 0.5, size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "#343a40", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b=10)),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "grey50", face = "italic", size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "grey30", size = 10),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
)

# Color palette matching the theme
theme_colors <- list(
  primary = "#005f73",
  secondary = "#2B638B",
  accent = "#c7254e",
  light_bg = "#eef7f7"
)
```

# Executive Summary

Brief overview of your analysis and key findings.

# Data Overview

```{r load-data}
#| label: load-data
#| echo: true

# Load your data here
# data <- read_csv("path/to/your/data.csv")
```

# Analysis Section 1

Your analysis content here.

```{r analysis-1}
#| label: analysis-1
#| echo: true
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

# Example plot with custom theme
# ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
#   geom_col(fill = theme_colors$primary) +
#   labs(title = "Your Plot Title")
```

# Conclusions

Summary of findings and next steps.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Report generated on `r Sys.Date()`*
